moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Day
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, one of tennis's four Grand Slams, concludes today, Sunday, July 12, 2026, with the men's singles final at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Last chance to watch
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! It's finals day at Wimbledon 2026 – who are you backing to lift the trophy? #WimbledonFinal

angles.name: Summer tradition
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon wraps up today, marking the end of another glorious British summer tradition. What a fortnight it's been.

moments.title: The Open Championship practice days begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, a major golf tournament, begins its practice days today, July 12, 2026, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, Merseyside, with the tournament proper running from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf action starts
angles.copy: From Centre Court to the green! The Open Championship practice days kick off today at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug? #TheOpen

angles.name: Major golf week ahead
angles.copy: It's a huge week for golf fans as the 154th Open Championship gets underway with practice rounds today. Get ready for some world-class swings!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Semi-Finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 moves into its semi-final stage this week, with matches scheduled for July 14-15, leading to the final on July 19.

angles.name: Semi-final anticipation
angles.copy: The World Cup semi-finals are just around the corner! Who will battle it out for a place in the biggest match in football? Get ready for drama!

angles.name: Road to the final
angles.copy: Only four teams left standing! The FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals are set to deliver unmissable football this week. Who's going all the way?

moments.title: UK heatwave continues, set to ease mid-week
moments.blurb: A heatwave continues across much of the UK, particularly Southern England and Wales, with temperatures expected to remain high over the weekend before easing slightly by mid-week, with some thunderstorms possible.

angles.name: Beat the heat
angles.copy: Another hot one across the UK this weekend! Stay hydrated, seek shade, and keep cool as the heatwave continues.

angles.name: Weather update
angles.copy: High temperatures persist across parts of the UK today, with forecasts suggesting a slight easing and potential thunderstorms later in the week. Keep an eye on the forecast!

moments.title: Summer school holidays in full swing
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are now underway or beginning this week across many parts of the UK, bringing longer breaks for students and families.

angles.name: Holiday vibes
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many across the UK are now officially on their summer break. What are your plans for the long holidays?

angles.name: Family fun planning
angles.copy: With summer holidays starting for many, it's time for family adventures! What hidden gems are you planning to explore in the UK this summer?

moments.title: Latitude Festival just around the corner
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026, celebrating its 20th anniversary, takes place from July 23-26 at Henham Park in Suffolk, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival excitement builds
angles.copy: Only 11 days until Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: 20 years of Latitude
angles.copy: Celebrating 20 years of music, arts, and culture! Latitude Festival is almost here, bringing David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi to Suffolk.

moments.title: Richard Ashcroft plays Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Former The Verve frontman Richard Ashcroft will perform a headline show at Cardiff Castle on Thursday, July 16, supported by Tom Meighan and Apollo Junction.

angles.name: Ashcroft in Cardiff
angles.copy: Richard Ashcroft takes over Cardiff Castle this Thursday! Get ready for a night of classic hits and new material.

angles.name: The Verve legend live
angles.copy: From The Verve to solo stardom, Richard Ashcroft brings his iconic sound to Cardiff Castle on July 16th. Who's going?

moments.title: Sammy Virji hits Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Garage and bassline sensation Sammy Virji will play Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 18, as part of the DEPOT Live series.

angles.name: Dance night in Cardiff
angles.copy: Get ready to move! Sammy Virji is bringing the bassline to Cardiff Castle this Saturday, July 18th. Who's joining the party?

angles.name: Weekend plans in Wales
angles.copy: Your weekend just got better! Sammy Virji live at Cardiff Castle this Saturday. Expect big tunes and an even bigger atmosphere.

moments.title: PET NEEDS play Exeter Cavern
moments.blurb: Punk rock band PET NEEDS are performing live tonight, July 12, at Bomba Exeter.

angles.name: Live music tonight Exeter
angles.copy: Kick off your Sunday night with some live punk rock! PET NEEDS are at Bomba Exeter tonight. Don't miss out!

angles.name: Punk rock Sunday
angles.copy: PET NEEDS are tearing up Exeter Cavern tonight! If you're in Devon, get down there for a dose of raw energy.

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, songwriter, and activist M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam) will celebrate her 51st birthday on July 18, 2026.

angles.name: M.I.A. turns 51
angles.copy: Paper Planes, anyone? The incredible M.I.A. celebrates her 51st birthday on July 18th! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Birthday shout-out
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 51st Birthday to the pioneering artist M.I.A. this Friday! Still bringing the heat.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 19, 2026.

angles.name: Queen legend's birthday
angles.copy: A very Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May of Queen on July 19th! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Guitar icon
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's guitar work is iconic. Wishing him a fantastic 79th birthday this Sunday!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning guitarist Carlos Santana will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar legend's day
angles.copy: Smooth sounds and legendary licks! Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Musical icon
angles.copy: 79 years young and still a guitar hero! Wishing a very happy birthday to Carlos Santana this Monday.

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band Sex Pistols, will celebrate his 70th birthday on July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Punk rock pioneer
angles.copy: Anarchy in the UK! Happy 70th Birthday to Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook on July 20th. Still a punk icon.

angles.name: 70 and still rocking
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook, the man who provided the beat for the Sex Pistols! Have a good one!

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, will celebrate his 78th birthday on July 21, 2026.

angles.name: Folk legend's birthday
angles.copy: From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', the timeless music of Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) continues to resonate. Happy 78th Birthday on July 21st!

angles.name: 78 years of music
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic singer-songwriter Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam this Tuesday! What's your favourite of his tracks?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Eagles legend's birthday
angles.copy: Take it easy! Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley of the Eagles on July 22nd! What's your top Eagles song?

angles.name: 79 years of hits
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley, the voice behind so many iconic Eagles tracks. Still got that lyrical magic!
